editorial_overview:
No relevant articles from established European news outlets in the last week could be reliably identified that specifically report on politicians or public figures deleting social media posts, making new controversial social media statements, or facing government or court-ordered online content removal, within the constraints of the available search results.
The surfaced results were either unrelated to the user’s criteria, too general (e.g. analytical pieces on EU digital regulation), or not clearly dated within the last week.
Given these limitations, any attempt to name specific recent cases, headlines, or outlets would require inventing or paraphrasing sources, which the user requested not to do.
The absence of usable items here reflects gaps in the provided search results, not an absence of such events in Europe more broadly.
topic: European digital speech and political content moderation news (last week)
